disputes: All-in package price from booking sites is ~2,200 THB (green fee + caddie + cart bundled). Breakdown not confirmed from official source — green fee estimated at 1,500 THB weekday / 2,000 THB weekend with caddie and cart separately charged. Marked provisional.
Designer listed as 'Mark Rathert' on 1golf.eu / allsquaregolf; one source says 'Rather International'. Using Mark Rathert as primary.
data_notes: Course length confirmed 6,961 yards / 6,365 m from multiple sources.
Caddie and cart both mandatory per fairwaysofeden and thailandgolfers.
Located ~40 min from Chiang Rai city, ~30 km from CEI airport.
Phone numbers: 081-530-6535 and 053-953-440 per official site. Using 053-953-440 as primary.
GPS coordinates approximate — course is in southern Chiang Rai hills near Wiang Chiang Rung.
